---
title: "Google Analytics Client Dashboard"
subtitle: "Traffic, Revenue, and Conversion Performance"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---



```{r setup}
library(bigrquery)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(DT)
library(bslib)

project_id <- "ga4-analysis-491223"

sql <- "
SELECT
  PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', date) AS session_date,
  trafficSource.source AS source,
  trafficSource.medium AS medium,
  device.deviceCategory AS device_category,
  geoNetwork.country AS country,

  COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(fullVisitorId, CAST(visitId AS STRING))) AS sessions,

  SUM(IFNULL(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS pageviews,
  SUM(IFNULL(totals.transactions, 0)) AS transactions,
  SUM(IFNULL(totals.transactionRevenue, 0)) / 1000000 AS revenue

FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`

WHERE _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20160801' AND '20170801'

GROUP BY
  session_date,
  source,
  medium,
  device_category,
  country
"

ga_mart <- bq_project_query(project_id, sql) |>
  bq_table_download()

daily <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(session_date) |>
  summarise(
    users = sum(users, na.rm = TRUE),
    sessions = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    pageviews = sum(pageviews, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    conversion_rate = transactions / sessions,
    revenue_per_session = revenue / sessions
  )

source_perf <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(source, medium) |>
  summarise(
    users = sum(users, na.rm = TRUE),
    sessions = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    pageviews = sum(pageviews, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    conversion_rate = transactions / sessions,
    revenue_per_session = revenue / sessions
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(revenue))

device_perf <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(device_category) |>
  summarise(
    sessions = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(conversion_rate = transactions / sessions)

country_perf <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarise(
    sessions = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(revenue)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10)

total_users <- sum(daily$users, na.rm = TRUE)
total_sessions <- sum(daily$sessions, na.rm = TRUE)
total_transactions <- sum(daily$transactions, na.rm = TRUE)
total_revenue <- sum(daily$revenue, na.rm = TRUE)
overall_conversion_rate <- total_transactions / total_sessions
revenue_per_session <- total_revenue / total_sessions
```

# Executive Summary

## Row {.valuebox-row}

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Total Users",
  value = comma(total_users)
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Total Sessions",
  value = comma(total_sessions)
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Transactions",
  value = comma(total_transactions)
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Revenue",
  value = dollar(total_revenue)
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Conversion Rate",
  value = percent(overall_conversion_rate, accuracy = 0.1)
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Revenue / Session",
  value = dollar(revenue_per_session)
)
```

# Performance Trends

## Row

```{r}
ggplot(daily, aes(x = session_date, y = sessions)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Sessions Over Time",
    subtitle = "Traffic volume by day",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Sessions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(daily, aes(x = session_date, y = revenue)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  labs(
    title = "Revenue Over Time",
    subtitle = "Daily ecommerce revenue",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Revenue"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Row

```{r}
ggplot(daily, aes(x = session_date, y = conversion_rate)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Conversion Rate Over Time",
    subtitle = "Transactions divided by sessions",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Conversion Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(daily, aes(x = session_date, y = revenue_per_session)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  labs(
    title = "Revenue per Session Over Time",
    subtitle = "Revenue efficiency by visit",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Revenue per Session"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Acquisition Performance

## Row

```{r}
source_top <- source_perf |>
  slice_head(n = 10)

ggplot(source_top, aes(x = reorder(source, revenue), y = revenue)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Traffic Sources by Revenue",
    subtitle = "Revenue contribution by acquisition source",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Revenue"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(source_top, aes(x = reorder(source, conversion_rate), y = conversion_rate)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Traffic Sources by Conversion Rate",
    subtitle = "Efficiency of traffic sources",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Conversion Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Row

```{r}
datatable(
  source_perf |>
    mutate(
      revenue = dollar(revenue),
      conversion_rate = percent(conversion_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
      revenue_per_session = dollar(revenue_per_session)
    ),
  colnames = c(
    "Source", "Medium", "Users", "Sessions", "Pageviews",
    "Transactions", "Revenue", "Conversion Rate", "Revenue per Session"
  ),
  options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE),
  rownames = FALSE
)
```

# Device and Geography 

## Row

```{r}
ggplot(device_perf, aes(x = reorder(device_category, revenue), y = revenue)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  labs(
    title = "Revenue by Device Category",
    subtitle = "Desktop, mobile, and tablet performance",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Revenue"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(country_perf, aes(x = reorder(country, revenue), y = revenue)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar) +
  labs(
    title = "Top Countries by Revenue",
    subtitle = "Highest-value geographic markets",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Revenue"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
getwd()
```
